strategy.name: Intraday Momentum — Ross Cameron & Andrew Aziz Framework
sources: Ross Cameron (Warrior Trading) — Gap & Go, VWAP momentum, 1-min/5-min EMA strategy
Andrew Aziz (Bear Bull Traders) — ABCD pattern, Opening Range Breakout, VWAP trend strategy
strategy.avoid: 12:00 PM – 2:00 PM ET (dead zone — low volume, choppy)

indicators.ema_9: Primary dynamic support. Enter pullbacks to this line. Exit if price closes below it.
indicators.ema_20: Stronger support/resistance. Stop-loss reference for trend trades. Cross above = bullish signal.
indicators.vwap: THE most important intraday level. Above VWAP = buyers in control, only look long. Below VWAP = sellers in control, only look short.
indicators.volume: Non-negotiable confirmation. No volume = no trade. Look for relative volume 2x+ average.
indicators.rsi_14: Extreme readings only. RSI above 90 on 5-min = overextended short setup. RSI below 10 = overextended long reversal.
indicators.bollinger_bands_20_2: Used for reversal setups. Price at upper band + RSI 90+ = short candidate. Price at lower band + RSI 10- = long reversal.

pre_market_checklist: Identify stocks gapping up 4%+ with a news catalyst
Check pre-market volume — must be above average
Mark pre-market high and low as key levels
Note prior day's high and low as support/resistance
Assess overall market direction (spy/QQQ gap direction)

bullish: Price is above VWAP (non-negotiable for longs)
9 EMA is above 20 EMA on the 5-min chart
Stock gapped up with a catalyst
Relative volume is 2x or more above average
bearish: Price is below VWAP (non-negotiable for shorts)
9 EMA is below 20 EMA on the 5-min chart
Stock gapped down or is fading from highs
neutral_avoid: Price is chopping around VWAP (avoid — no edge)
Volume is below average (dead zone — skip)
Time is between 12:00 PM and 2:00 PM ET (avoid — graveyard shift)

gap_and_go.description: Ross Cameron's core setup. Stock gaps up 4%+ at open on news, breaks pre-market high with volume.
gap_and_go.entry: Buy the break of the pre-market high on the 1-min chart with above-average volume
gap_and_go.stop: Below the low of the entry candle or pre-market support
gap_and_go.target: R:R minimum 2:1; scale out at round numbers and prior resistance

vwap_pullback.description: Stock is above VWAP, pulls back to VWAP, holds and bounces. 9 EMA acting as support.
vwap_pullback.entry: Buy when price touches VWAP and closes back above it with volume on the 1-min chart
vwap_pullback.target: Prior intraday high or next resistance level

abcd_pattern.description: Andrew Aziz's core setup. Stock surges (A to B), pulls back (B to C), resumes (C to D).
abcd_pattern.entry: Buy the break above the B high after price holds the C pullback
abcd_pattern.target: Equal move from C as A to B (measured move)

opening_range_breakout.description: Use the first 5-minute candle as the opening range. Enter on break of that candle's high or low.
opening_range_breakout.entry: Buy break of 5-min opening range high (or short break of low) with volume
opening_range_breakout.stop: Below the opening range low (for longs)

ema_9_20_cross.description: 9 EMA crosses above 20 EMA on 5-min chart while price is above VWAP. Classic Andrew Aziz trigger.
ema_9_20_cross.entry: Buy when 9 EMA crosses above 20 EMA AND price is above VWAP AND new 5-min high forms
ema_9_20_cross.target: Trail with 9 EMA until it breaks

exit_rules: Move stop to break-even as soon as first profit target is hit
Take 1/2 position off at first resistance (round number, prior high, VWAP)
Trail remainder with the 9 EMA — exit on close below it
Hard stop: exit immediately if price closes a 1-min candle below the 20 EMA against your position
Time stop: close all positions by 11:30 AM ET if not already stopped out
risk_rules: Maximum risk per trade: 1% of account
Stop trading after 2 consecutive losses — wait for next session
Never trade in the first 5 minutes of market open (9:30–9:35 AM) — let price find direction
Only take trades with minimum 2:1 risk-reward ratio
No trading between 12:00 PM and 2:00 PM ET
Above-average relative volume required on every entry — no exceptions
notes: Intraday strategy based on Ross Cameron (Warrior Trading) and Andrew Aziz (Bear Bull Traders) publicly documented frameworks. Key principle: trade in the direction of VWAP during the first 90 minutes of the session only, using 9/20 EMA as dynamic support and volume as confirmation. The 5-min chart is for pattern recognition; the 1-min chart is for precise entry timing.
